title: pouteria moluccana
intro: Pouteria moluccana, also known as the Kapok tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its large, white flowers and long, seed-filled pods. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pouteria moluccana include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparation of the tree involves the use of its bark, seeds, and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and other medicinal remedies.
